stemHtml: During a flight in icing conditions the AoA sensor vanes become frozen and stuck in their current position. The crew are NOT aware of this and the Pilot Flying lowers the nose of the aeroplane to start a descent. What will be the AoA reading?

options.a: No AoA indication in combination with a warning of a fault in these sensors.
options.b: The same AoA as during level flight, thus providing false data.
options.c: The correct AoA for the descent, as other systems will compensate for the stuck AoA sensors.
options.d: The force of the airflow when starting the descent will crack the ice, the AoA vanes will operate again and provide the correct AoA.
